profile.summary: Data Analyst with 6 years of experience turning operational data into business decisions. Built 25 production dashboards used by over 300 stakeholders and identified efficiencies that saved roughly 1.4 million dollars annually.

experiences.title: Senior Data Analyst
experiences.description: Analytics partner to the operations and merchandising teams of a national retailer.
achievements: Identified pricing and inventory efficiencies through analysis that saved roughly 1.4 million dollars annually.
Built 25 production dashboards in Tableau used by over 300 stakeholders across 5 departments.
Designed an A/B testing framework that increased email conversion by 12 percent across 8 campaigns.

experiences.title: Data Analyst
experiences.description: Provided reporting and ad-hoc analysis for the supply-chain organization.
achievements: Automated a weekly reporting process with SQL and Python, saving the team around 10 hours per week.
Reduced report errors by 90 percent by building validated, version-controlled data models.

jobPosting.title: Analytics Lead
jobPosting.fullText: Evergreen Commerce Inc. is an e-commerce company with 340 employees and over 2 million active customers. We are hiring an Analytics Lead for our Seattle headquarters. Responsibilities: lead a team of 3 analysts, own the company's reporting and experimentation framework, partner with product and marketing on data-driven decisions, and build self-service analytics on our Snowflake warehouse. Requirements: several years of analytics experience, expert SQL, strong data-visualization skills, experience with experimentation, and the ability to communicate insight to non-technical stakeholders. We offer fully remote work, an annual learning budget, and a clear technical-leadership track. Your point of contact is Ms. Rachel Nguyen, Director of Data. Please indicate your earliest possible start date and salary expectation.
